name: ai-furniture-hub
description: AI agent MCP server for furniture, home appliances, smart home, beauty devices, gadgets & more. 15 tools + 3 prompt workflows across 31 categories. mm-precision search, curated sets (bundles, room presets, influencer picks, hack sets), dimension-compatible replacement finder with fit_score, AI visibility diagnosis (AIO), OpenAPI 3.1 schema, attribution tracking. Rakuten live API + Amazon affiliate.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search curated catalog by keyword, brand, dimensions (mm), price, color, category. Returns related_items_hint and curated_in.

tools.name: get_product_detail
tools.description: Full specs by product ID: inner dimensions, consumables, compatible storage, curations.

tools.name: search_rakuten_products
tools.description: Real-time Rakuten Ichiba search with affiliate URLs, prices, and reviews.

tools.name: search_amazon_products
tools.description: Amazon affiliate search link generation. SearchIndex auto-selected by category.

tools.name: coordinate_storage
tools.description: Shelf + storage box set proposals with quantity per tier and total cost.

tools.name: suggest_by_space
tools.description: Space dimensions (mm) -> fitting products across categories. Rotation-aware.

tools.name: identify_product
tools.description: Visual feature text -> product candidates with model number and specs.

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2-5 products on price, size, load, reviews.

tools.name: find_replacement
tools.description: Discontinued model -> successors + dimension-compatible alternatives with fit_score (0-100).

tools.name: calc_room_layout
tools.description: Floor-plan rectangle packing simulation with placement coordinates.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Browse all 31 categories with product counts, brands, and samples.

tools.name: get_popular_products
tools.description: Recommended products by category/brand with Rakuten trending data.

tools.name: get_related_items
tools.description: Related-item chain: accessories, protection, consumables, hack substitutes. depth=2 supported.

tools.name: get_curated_sets
tools.description: Curated bundles, room presets, influencer picks, hack sets. Filter by type, scene, occasion, budget.

tools.name: diagnose_ai_visibility
tools.description: AI visibility audit: llms.txt, robots.txt, JSON-LD, OGP, cross-border readiness. Score 0-100.

prompts.name: room_coordinator
prompts.description: Space dimensions -> shelf + boxes + protection with quantities and cost.

prompts.name: moving_checklist
prompts.description: Room-by-room purchasing checklist for a new home with budget estimates.

prompts.name: product_showdown
prompts.description: Detailed two-product comparison including accessory and running costs.

categories: 突っ張り棒・つっぱり
カーテン・ブラインド
ガジェット・モバイル
